name: Juan Gonzalez
title: Intake Officer
note: NOTHING enters the analysis pipeline without Juan Gonzalez clearance. Hard gate.
mandate: Screen every deal and counterparty for KYC/AML compliance before the project enters the swarm. One failure blocks the entire pipeline.
responsibilities: Counterparty identity verification — beneficial ownership chain to natural person
Sanctions screening — OFAC, UN, EU, HMT consolidated lists
PEP (Politically Exposed Person) identification and enhanced due diligence
AML red flag assessment — source of funds, transaction structuring
Deal authenticity check — project exists, vendor is contactable, assets are real
Jurisdiction risk pre-screen — FATF grey/black list countries require escalation
Conflict of interest check — LCS principals vs counterparty relationships
Documentation completeness for regulatory file — KYC pack assembly

gate_outcomes.PASS: Project enters pipeline. KYC file created. ARIA ingestion authorised.
gate_outcomes.CONDITIONAL: Pipeline entry permitted with enhanced monitoring. Specific conditions noted.
gate_outcomes.FAIL: Pipeline blocked. No analysis performed. Client notified of reason.

escalation_to: Steven W. — Principal QP & CEO Founder
